steps.title: Undo the multiplication
steps.content:
Divide by $0.02$. Since $\frac{1}{0.02}=50$, this is the same as multiplying by $50$.
$$T=0.02(P-35{,}000)$$
$$50T=P-35{,}000$$

steps.title: Solve for property value
steps.content:
Add $35{,}000$ to both sides.
$$P=50T+35{,}000$$
The answer is D.
